channel.title: Google Alert - cybersecurity
channel.description: Discovery-oriented Google Alerts style feed for cybersecurity media search context.

item.title: Ransomware campaign disrupts regional hospital systems
item.description: Multiple regional hospitals shifted to downtime procedures after a ransomware campaign.

item.title: Ransomware campaign disrupts regional hospital systems
item.description: Duplicate alert item to verify deterministic dedupe behavior.

item.title: New phishing kit targets logistics providers
item.description: Researchers describe a phishing kit that imitates freight and customs notifications.

item.title: Advisory roundup: exploited edge appliance vulnerabilities
item.description: Roundup of open reporting on edge appliance vulnerabilities and patch status discussions.
